customer_name.evidence: Agent: Hi Neha baat kar rahi hu HDFC Life ke behalf se. ... Customer: Bole Neha ji boliye.

state.evidence: Customer: Gujarat se bol raha sir.

temperature.evidence: Customer: Neha ji main 7 baje free ho jaunga. Please main abhi aapko bol dunga 6 baje ho jaunga. Fir aapka call aayega main nahi karunga aisa kuch nahi hai.

objections.quote: Haan use toh karte hai but abhi koi interest nahi hai yaar. Matlab share market ki sthiti down hai na.
Neha ji, Neha ji thoda time nahi hai ki mujhe call.

investment_sophistication.evidence: Customer: Matlab share market ki sthiti down hai na.

primary_goal.evidence: Agent: HDFC Life ne ek aisa unique plan design kiya hai sir jisme aapko same year se 36% ki tax free income aati hai whole life ke liye.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Neha ji main 7 baje free ho jaunga. ... Main aage tumhare saath baat ho jayegi.

agent_promises: 36% tax free income from same year for whole life
guaranteed return in writing on bond paper

missed_opportunities: did not ask about family protection needs
did not ask about existing insurance coverage

approachability.reasoning: Customer was polite, provided details, and explicitly requested a callback at a specific time.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent introduced herself as calling from HDFC Life and immediately pitched a 36% tax-free income plan.
call_narrative.customer_response: Customer was initially hesitant due to market conditions but became cooperative once the agent clarified the product was guaranteed.
call_narrative.key_event: Customer raised an objection about market volatility, which the agent addressed by emphasizing the guaranteed nature of the product.
call_narrative.ending: The call ended with a clear agreement to reconnect at 7 PM that evening.

key_quotes: Matlab share market ki sthiti down hai na.
Neha ji main 7 baje free ho jaunga.
